TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ku shu shu == Gaga mniq Taytung Tausyang ka alang Ku shu shu. 67 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 141 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 116 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan 74%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%, Rukai 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ku sħu sħu == gaga mniq tajtuŋ tausjaŋ ka alaŋ ku sħu sħu. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan **%, amis *%, tajal *%, pujuma *%, ɾukai *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: == Ku shu shu == Gaga mniq Taytung Tausyang ka alang Ku shu shu. 67 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 141 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 116 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 5 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan 74%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%, Rukai 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ku sħu sħu == gaga mniq tajtuŋ tausjaŋ ka alaŋ ku sħu sħu. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan **%, amis *%, tajal *%, pujuma *%, ɾukai *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
